# pheno-flags

> Canonical feature-flag set for the pheno-* fleet. Synchronous
> in-memory boolean storage with env-var population.

## Public API

- `FlagSet` — `HashMap<String, bool>` wrapper with O(1) `is_enabled(key)`
  and sorted `snapshot()` returning `BTreeMap<String, bool>`
- `FlagSet::new()`, `.with(key, value)` — fluent builder
- `FlagSet::from_env(prefix)` — scan process env for `<PREFIX>_*`,
  parse truthy (`1|true|yes`, case-insensitive) or falsy (`0|false|no`)
  values; any other value returns `Err(FlagError::InvalidValue)`
- `FlagError` — `thiserror`-based error type with `UnknownKey`,
  `InvalidValue { key, value }`, `EmptyPrefix` variants
- `merge(base, overlay)` — overlay wins; identical keys collapse to
  the right-hand value

## Quickstart

```rust
use pheno_flags::FlagSet;
let flags = FlagSet::new()
    .with("dark_mode", true)
    .with("beta_export", false);
assert!(flags.is_enabled("dark_mode"));
assert!(!flags.is_enabled("beta_export"));
assert!(!flags.is_enabled("unknown_key"));  // unknown returns false
```

## Files

- `Cargo.toml` — package manifest (v0.1.0)
- `src/lib.rs` — FlagSet, FlagSet::from_env, FlagError
- `tests/flag_test.rs` — env-var parsing, builder, merge semantics
- `examples/quickstart.rs` — minimal example
- `llvm-cov.toml` — 80% lib coverage gate (ADR-040)
- `.github/workflows/ci.yml` — build + test + coverage jobs
- `LICENSE-MIT`, `LICENSE-APACHE` — dual license

## Conventions

- Conventional Commits
- rustfmt + clippy (`-D warnings`)
- 80% lib coverage gate (ADR-040)
- `thiserror` for error types; no `unwrap()` in public API
- Public API surface fully documented (`#![warn(missing_docs)]`)
- No FFI, no async, no network — intentionally minimal substrate
- Unknown keys return `false` (never error) for `is_enabled`

## See also

- `pheno-config` — typed config loader (config layer below flags)
- `pheno-context` — request context (flags are request-scoped opt-in)
- `pheno-errors` — `thiserror`-aligned error envelope
- `pheno-port-adapter` — flag injection for port adapters
- ADR-022 (config consolidation), ADR-040 (coverage gates)
